# Archived Documentation Index

**Status:** Historical Reference Only  
**Created:** 2026-05-27  
**Rule:** These documents are frozen. Do not edit. For current specs, see `docs/00-master/`.

## ⚠️ DEPRECATION NOTICE

All documents listed below are **archived** and no longer maintained. The canonical documentation now lives in `docs/00-master/`:

| Master Doc | Replaces |
|------------|----------|
| `00-INDEX.md` | This index + all navigation |
| `01-PLATFORM.md` | `02-foundation/`, `01-meta/`, `10-design/README.md` |
| `02-SCHEMA.md` | `03-core-systems/02-database.md`, `SCHEMA_AUDIT_REPORT_20260525.md` |
| `03-API.md` | `03-core-systems/03-api-standards.md` |
| `04-PHASES.md` | `11-implementation/*`, `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` |
| `05-DRIFT.md` | `docs/design/DRIFT.md` (supersedes all drift docs) |
| `06-EVOLUTION.md` | `06-growth/03-evolution.md`, `10-design/5.3-BELIEF-CONFLICTS.md` |

## Why These Are Archived

1. **Fragmentation** — 127 files across 14 directories, many overlapping
2. **Staleness** — Most predate current production schema
3. **Inconsistency** — Same concept described differently in multiple files
4. **Superseded** — `docs/00-master/` provides unified, production-aligned specs

## If You Need Historical Context

Search this index by filename. The files remain in place for reference but will not be updated.
